png_read_discipline: every PNG opened directly, no same-as shortcuts

flows.axis_a_shell: PASS — anon/tenant-user get kiosk, tenant-admin gets admin shell with sidebar
flows.axis_b_role_branching: PASS — every role has purpose-built view. Anonymous sees 2-field role-aware demo; tenant-user sees 3 fields; tenant-admin sees 4 fields + admin tip + admin console; tenant-admin build gets 3-column Form Builder (Field Types | Canvas | Live Preview role-switcher); tenant-user respond gets Typeform-style kiosk with letter-key (A/B/C/D) selectors + keyboard hint + 'PARTNERSHIP INTAKE' branding
flows.axis_d_state: PASS — populated-anonymous and populated-tenant-user both redacted (no schemaId leak, correct V-R13-B behavior); populated-tenant-admin shows schemaId/version/publishedAt/publicUrl (appropriate admin detail); build canvas shows Full name REQUIRED text/Email email/How did you hear select tenant-user/Budget number business-partner with audience metadata
flows.role_leak_check: PASS — no FLOW-NN visible, no destructive actions on consumer roles, populated redaction correct per V-R13-B
flows.copy_humanization: PASS mostly — 'Admin view of form schemas, submissions, validation, and workflow automations' acceptable for admin; 'Raw index browser (admin debug)' label in primary-tenant-admin is slight engineering leak but in admin context
concerns: Raw 'ui-1776451844457' IDs visible in primary-tenant-admin Form Schemas — Admin Console (acceptable for admin debug but verbose)
'Tenant-facing' chip label and 'created via UI form' notes are admin-database-view language
flows.rationale: V-R13-B redaction + 3-column builder + Typeform kiosk + admin panel all verified. Role-branching is exemplary. Populated state correctly redacts schemaId on anon/tenant-user. Admin-only schema metadata (FRM-2026-0419-017, publicUrl) properly scoped to tenant-admin.

flows.axis_a_shell: PASS — all roles get admin shell (appropriate since ETL is a platform-admin-facing domain per audience)
flows.axis_b_role_branching: CONCERN — platform-admin gets Platform ETL Ops dashboard + platform-support gets ETL Inspector (read-only) + tenant-admin gets 'Tenant connector console' — HOWEVER tenant-admin view falls through to a raw CRUD table titled 'ETL Data Integration — Raw index browser (admin debug) — reads /api/dynamic/xiigen-etl-data-integration' with ui-NNNNN IDs and Delete actions. This is a raw-index/admin-debug leak. Tenant-admin should see a purpose-built connector setup view, not a raw CRUD table
flows.axis_d_state: CONCERN — populated-platform-admin exposes technical field names (jobId, rowsTransformed, schemaVersion, durationMs) and 'State 5' + 'Transforming' enum; acceptable for platform-admin audience but format is dev-debug-y
flows.role_leak_check: BLOCK — 'Raw index browser (admin debug)' label visible on tenant-admin, '/api/dynamic/xiigen-etl-data-integration' API path visible, 'Admin-facing' chip visible — engineering/debug surface leaked to tenant-admin. Also tenant-admin exposed to Delete destructive action on rows they likely did not create
flows.copy_humanization: CONCERN — 'dead-letter queue 12 needs review' on primary-platform-admin uses DLQ engineering jargon; 'Active extraction jobs 47' is borderline jargon but readable
concerns: DLQ ('dead-letter queue') jargon on platform-admin dashboard
Technical field names (jobId, rowsTransformed, schemaVersion, durationMs) in populated state
blocks: 'Raw index browser (admin debug)' label leaked to tenant-admin primary view
API path '/api/dynamic/xiigen-etl-data-integration' rendered as user-facing copy
Raw ui-1776451851260 IDs shown instead of connector display names
flows.rationale: Tenant-admin view falls back to raw CRUD admin-debug table with API paths and ui- IDs — this is an engineering surface leak that fails the OP-2/human-friendliness bar. Platform-admin and support views are purpose-built and fine. Fix: render a connector setup card grid for tenant-admin, same pattern as dynamic-forms-workflows tenant-admin admin panel.

flows.axis_a_shell: PASS — anon and tenant-user get kiosk (appropriate for consumer); event-organiser and tenant-admin get admin shell
flows.axis_b_role_branching: PASS — anonymous sees 'Sign in to RSVP' kiosk; tenant-user sees 'Your attendance' kiosk with RSVP status + QR link; event-organiser sees Attendance dashboard with check-in kiosk opener + 3/2/2 counts + RSVP list + waitlist promote; tenant-admin sees 'Attendance moderation' with refund Approve/Reject
flows.axis_d_state: CONCERN — populated-tenant-user renders as 404 Page Not Found. The primary-tenant-user works correctly as kiosk but the ?mock=populated route is unmapped for this role
flows.role_leak_check: PASS — no admin leaks to consumer; att-001/ref-001 raw IDs visible only in admin/organiser views (acceptable)
flows.copy_humanization: CONCERN — 'CONFIRMED', 'WAITLISTED', 'Checked in' all-caps enum styling; 'att-001' raw IDs visible in admin views; 'ref-001' visible. Labels readable but enum formatting leaks
concerns: populated-tenant-user routes to 404 (mock state not wired for this role)
CONFIRMED/WAITLISTED all-caps pill enums (should be 'Confirmed', 'Waitlisted')
Raw att-001/ref-001 IDs in admin views
flows.rationale: Role-branching and shells are well-done. Only a populated-state routing gap (404) and minor enum-formatting concerns. Not a blocker since primary-tenant-user works — the populated mock simply falls through. Axis D for this role incomplete.

flows.axis_a_shell: PASS — anon and tenant-user get kiosk; platform-admin and tenant-admin get admin shell
flows.axis_b_role_branching: PASS — anon sees Upcoming Events with 'Sign in to register'; tenant-user sees 'You're viewing events as an attendee' with Register CTAs; tenant-admin sees 'Event Moderation' with Approve/Reject; platform-admin sees 'Platform Event Ops' cross-tenant dashboard with 284 active + 12 pending review
flows.role_leak_check: PASS — no cross-tenant leaks to consumer
flows.copy_humanization: CONCERN — 'PENDING_REVIEW' all-caps enum on tenant-admin moderation view; 'org-001', 'org-002' raw organiser IDs visible
concerns: PENDING_REVIEW enum leak (should be 'Pending review')
Raw org-001/002 IDs shown to tenant-admin (acceptable but not humanized)
No populated-*.png captures in this flow folder — Axis D coverage incomplete
flows.rationale: Shells and role-branching are strong. Only concerns are enum formatting and missing populated-state captures. Primary views deliver purpose-built surfaces per role.

flows.axis_a_shell: PASS — platform roles only; admin shell with sidebar correct
flows.axis_b_role_branching: PASS — platform-admin sees Feature Matrix with Port/Initiate-porting CTAs + 'Engine-internal' lock badges on FT-047 and FT-063; platform-support sees same matrix with 'read-only for support access — Controls are disabled. Escalate to a platform-admin'
flows.axis_d_state: PASS — populated-platform-admin shows purpose-built detail (featureId FT-024, targetPlatform marketplace, adapterMode MODE_B, activatedAt timestamp). FT-XXX IDs are legitimate per D-FT-1 rule (platform admin consumes them)
flows.role_leak_check: PASS — flow intentionally platform-only (no tenant/anon renders captured), matching D-FT-1 scope
flows.copy_humanization: CONCERN — 'MODE_B' enum leak (adapterMode MODE_B); 'State 4' label is dev-state-language; 'Admin view of FT-XXX records — registration, porting decision, verification, activation, deprecation' is platform-admin-appropriate but technical
concerns: MODE_B adapter-mode enum on populated view
'State 4' framing in populated state (should be human label like 'Active on target')
Platform-support controls look enabled in primary-platform-support despite warning saying 'Controls are disabled'
flows.rationale: Platform-admin-only flow, FT-XXX identifiers legitimate per D-FT-1. Role-branching between platform-admin (full edit) and platform-support (read-only) works. Minor concerns: MODE_B enum, State 4 dev label, support warning not visually enforced by disabled controls.

flows.axis_a_shell: BLOCK — anonymous gets kiosk (correct) but rendered surface is full admin authoring panel (Validate template / Publish version / Create form / View analytics). tenant-user gets kiosk shell but also full admin authoring surface PLUS a Published Templates section at bottom
flows.axis_b_role_branching: BLOCK — anonymous and tenant-user both see admin authoring controls ('Validate template', 'Publish version' green CTA, 'View analytics' orange CTA, 'v1 · Draft' chip) that should be admin-only. tenant-admin view correctly includes Condition Builder with viewerRole variable + Role Preview dropdown (Tenant User) showing Visible:[full-name,email,company-name] / Hidden:[hourly-rate,budget,internal-notes]
flows.role_leak_check: BLOCK — admin authoring controls (Publish version, Validate template) leaked to anonymous and tenant-user. Publishing controls are administrative authoring actions, not consumer actions
flows.copy_humanization: PASS on authoring copy ('Check required fields, field types, and that constraints are consistent before you publish' is human-readable); 'v1 · Draft' chip is tokens-not-enum friendly
concerns: No populated-*.png captures — Axis D incomplete
blocks: Anonymous sees admin authoring surface (Validate template, Publish version, Create form, View analytics buttons) — should be locked to tenant-admin
Tenant-user sees admin authoring surface — should only see Published Templates section for Use template
Missing role-branching: tenant-user needs a pure 'Use a template' consumer view separate from the authoring panel
flows.rationale: Serious role-branching failure: authoring controls (Validate / Publish / Create / Analytics) are rendered to anonymous and tenant-user roles. Tenant-admin view is correct (Condition Builder + Role Preview is purpose-built). Fix: gate the authoring panel on tenant-admin role; render only Published Templates list for tenant-user; render sign-in wall or published-templates-only for anonymous.

flows.axis_a_shell: PASS — anon and tenant-user get kiosk (no sidebar); business-partner, freelancer, platform-admin, platform-support, tenant-admin get admin shell
flows.axis_b_role_branching: PASS — anon sees 'Freelancer Gigs' kiosk with Sign in / Create account + gig previews with $range + bids counts; business-partner sees 'Post a Gig' form with milestone validator ('Milestones sum 0 / Budget 0 valid'); freelancer sees 'Browse & Bid on Gigs' with 'You're browsing as a freelancer' banner + purple Submit Bid CTA (role-distinct color); platform-admin sees 'Gig Platform Overview' with 1,247 total active + 3 flagged; platform-support sees 'Gig Inspector (Read-Only)' search; tenant-admin sees 'Gig Moderation' table with Posted By raw IDs + Remove destructive action; tenant-user gets the business-partner 'Post a Gig' form (reasonable reuse)

flows.copy_humanization: CONCERN — POSTED enum all-caps chip; 'user-abc123' raw IDs in admin views; 'Open Gig Ops Console' CTA uses 'Ops' which is engineering-adjacent
concerns: POSTED enum styling (should be 'Posted')
Raw user-abc123/def456 IDs on tenant-admin Gig Moderation (could be 'Posted by Acme Corp' etc.)
'Gig Ops Console' terminology on platform-admin (Ops is fine as industry term)
No populated-*.png captures — Axis D incomplete
flows.rationale: All 7 roles have purpose-built surfaces with shell differentiation. Business-partner gets gig-posting + milestone validator; freelancer gets purple-accent bid browser; platform tiers get cross-tenant ops/inspector views; tenant-admin gets moderation with destructive Remove action (appropriate for admin). Only minor enum/raw-ID polish concerns.
